name: Kotak IndiGo Ka-ching 6E Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Spend ₹1,50,000 or more in the previous year

categoryRates.description: 3% value back on IndiGo flight bookings
1.5% value back on dining and entertainment spends
1% value back on all other retail purchases

additionalBenefits: Earn 6E Rewards redeemable on IndiGo flights
Complimentary meal voucher on IndiGo for spends above ₹50,000/quarter
pros: Good value for frequent IndiGo flyers with 3% back on bookings
Rewards directly usable for IndiGo flights
Low annual fee that's easily waivable
cons: Rewards locked to IndiGo ecosystem only
Low value for non-IndiGo spends at just 1%
Minimal lounge access with only 2 domestic visits
idealFor: Frequent IndiGo flyers looking to earn free flights
Domestic travellers who prefer IndiGo airlines

faqs.question: How do I redeem 6E Rewards?
faqs.answer: You can redeem 6E Rewards directly on the IndiGo website or app for flight bookings, seat upgrades, and add-on services.

faqs.question: Can I use the card on other airlines?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can use the card anywhere Visa is accepted, but the higher reward rate of 3% applies only on IndiGo bookings.

faqs.question: Is the annual fee waivable?
faqs.answer: Yes, the ₹500 annual fee is waived on spending ₹1,50,000 or more in the previous year.
